mapper.sql: d.id AS d_id, d.qualification AS d_qualification, d.experience AS d_experience, d.bio AS d_bio, d.availability_status AS d_availability_status, d.experience_years AS d_experience_years, d.consultation_fee AS d_consultation_fee, d.is_verified AS d_is_verified, d.total_experience AS d_total_experience, d.created_at AS d_created_at, d.updated_at AS d_updated_at, u.id AS u_id, u.name AS u_name, u.mobile_number AS u_mobile_number, u.email AS u_email, u.role AS u_role, u.is_active AS u_is_active, u.created_at AS u_created_at, u.updated_at AS u_updated_at, s.id AS s_id, s.name AS s_name, s.description AS s_description, s.created_at AS s_created_at, s.updated_at AS s_updated_at
FROM doctors d JOIN users u ON u.id = d.user_id LEFT JOIN specializations s ON s.id = d.specialization_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE d.is_verified = TRUE ORDER BY u.name ASC

SELECT
WHERE d.availability_status = #{availabilityStatus} AND d.is_verified = TRUE ORDER BY u.name ASC

SELECT
WHERE LOWER(u.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{name}), '%') ORDER BY u.name ASC

SELECT
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC, d.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctors ( user_id, specialization_id, qualification, experience, bio, availability_status, experience_years, consultation_fee, is_verified, total_experience, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{user.id}, #{specialization.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{qualification}, #{experience}, #{bio}, #{availabilityStatus}, #{experienceYears}, #{consultationFee}, #{isVerified}, #{totalExperience}, NOW(6), NOW(6) )
mapper.update: UPDATE doctors SET user_id = #{user.id}, specialization_id = #{specialization.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, qualification = #{qualification}, experience = #{experience}, bio = #{bio}, availability_status = #{availabilityStatus}, experience_years = #{experienceYears}, consultation_fee = #{consultationFee}, is_verified = #{isVerified}, total_experience = #{totalExperience}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{id}
